name: Orange Muffins (Eggless)
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces orange juice, frozen concentrate, thawed
recipeInstructions:
Note that there are no eggs in this recipe, so these may be enjoyed by those who can't eat eggs. Preheat oven to 375°F. Spray 12 muffin tins with cooking spray.
Mix the flour, baking powder, and 1/4 cup sugar together. Set aside. In a large bowl, beat the thoroughly thawed orange juice concentrate, oil, yogurt, and apricot preserves together. Stir in the dried apples. Slowly stir the flour mixture into the liquid ingredients just until everything is moistened. Do not overmix. Spoon the batter into the muffin tins.
Mix the sugar, cinnamon, and nutmeg together, and sprinkle over the muffins. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes or until a cake tester comes out clean.
